description: Form container that submits child values together.

param.description: Optional canvas parameter name to broadcast consolidated form data to. If omitted, each child field is broadcast individually on submit.

card.description: If true, wraps the form in a card-like container.

centered.description: If true, centers the form container within the node.

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "padding: 16px; background-color: #f0f0f0")
